content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.4-xhigh

## Summary

No findings in the touched prompt-contract code. I reviewed `src/contexts/project_run_record/service.rs`, `src/contexts/project_run_record/task_prompt_contract.rs`, and `src/contexts/workflow_composition/prompt_review.rs` end-to-end; the fence-handling changes and prompt-review contract-drift checks look internally consistent. Targeted tests passed (`cargo test --quiet task_prompt_contract -- --nocapture` and `cargo test --quiet project_run_record_test -- --nocapture`); a broader `cargo test --quiet prompt_review -- --nocapture` run also hit separate `backend_diagnostics_test` failures outside these files.

## Amendments

None.
